question_title: What will be the value of "ICE BofA AAA US Corporate Index Effective Yield" on 2026-04-08?
summary: The ICE BofA AAA US Corporate Index Effective Yield has been in an elevated regime since March 10, 2026, oscillating between 4.78-5.04 with a regime mean of 4.924 and daily standard deviation of 0.066. The latest value is 4.95 (March 30). The upward shift from the prior ~4.64 regime coincides with renewed tariff uncertainty: after the Supreme Court struck down IEEPA tariffs on Feb 20, Trump imposed 10% global tariffs under Section 122 and opened Section 301 investigations into ~80 countries. Over the 7-business-day horizon to April 8, Monte Carlo simulation using regime-specific volatility produces a distribution centered near 4.95 with modest pull toward the regime mean of 4.924. The blended model (random walk + mean-reversion + mild upward drift, with volatility sensitivity testing) yields a median of ~4.95 and 80% CI of [4.73, 5.17].

factors.description: Latest value is 4.95 (Mar 30), within a stable regime since Mar 10 with mean 4.924 and daily std 0.066
Regime shift upward in early March: AAA yields jumped from ~4.55-4.60 range to 4.85-5.04 range, coinciding with Section 301 trade investigations and tariff uncertainty
10% global tariffs still in effect under Section 122 (150-day limit); Section 301 investigations into ~80 countries ongoing - sustained upward pressure on yields
10-year Treasury yield also elevated at 4.35 (Mar 30), up from ~4.05 in early March, confirming broad rates selloff not just credit-specific
Short horizon (7 business days) limits range of possible moves; mean reversion toward regime mean of 4.924 plausible given oscillation pattern
Potential for yield-increasing shock from tariff escalation, Section 301 results, or fiscal concerns from $165B tariff refunds
Potential for yield-decreasing move from flight-to-quality or trade de-escalation
factors.conditional: If risk-off event or trade de-escalation

reasoning:
**Forecast: ICE BofA AAA US Corporate Index Effective Yield on 2026-04-08**

**Median estimate: 4.95%** | 80% CI: [4.73%, 5.17%]

Key reasoning:
- The yield has been in a stable elevated regime since March 10 (mean 4.924, std 0.066), driven by tariff uncertainty after the Supreme Court struck down IEEPA tariffs and Trump reimposed 10% global tariffs under Section 122
- Latest value of 4.95 (March 30) is near the regime mean; no strong directional signal over the short 7-day horizon
- Monte Carlo simulation blending random walk, mean-reversion, and mild upward drift scenarios, with volatility sensitivity testing (fat/thin tails), produces the distribution above
- Tail risks come from potential tariff escalation (Section 301 investigation results) or de-escalation/flight-to-quality events
sources_consulted: [Bond markets have muted response to new tariff announcement](https://www.bondbuyer.com/news/bond-markets-have-muted-response-to-new-tariff-announcement)
[Trump says Justices Barrett, Gorsuch ‘sicken me’ after Supreme Court tariff ruling](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/26/trump-supreme-court-tariffs-barrett-gorsuch-trade-ieepa-ruling.html)
resolution_criteria: Resolves to the value found on the FRED API for the series BAMLC0A1CAAAEY once the data is published.
fine_print:
A script will be used to determine the resolution of this question. It will paginate through the data found at the API endpoint `https://api.stlouisfed.org/fred/series/observations?series_id=BAMLC0A1CAAAEY`. This endpoint includes the latest data for the series. The latest revised data will be used when the resolution is assessed. The datapoint matching 2026-04-08 will be used to determine the resolution of this question.

A datapoint matches if:
1. The series is updated daily and the date of the datapoint is within 1 day previous to the resolution date.
2. The series is updated weekly and the date of the datapoint is within 7 days previous to the resolution date.
3. The series is updated monthly and the date of the datapoint is within 31 days previous to the resolution date.

If the datapoint is clearly skipped, or no datapoint is found after 2 weeks of checking then the question will be annulled.
